projectDescription: Atmet is an AI-powered automation platform that lets teams connect their business apps, describe workflows in plain language, and have an AI agent execute recurring tasks automatically.
keyFeatures: AI Core — conversational agent interface for describing and building workflows in plain language
Workflow automation — define multi-step automated workflows triggered by app events
Skills library — reusable AI capability modules (system, workspace, or personal scope)
Integrations — connect Gmail, Google Drive, Telegram, GitHub, and more via OAuth or API key
Generative UI — agent dynamically renders input panels (file pickers, contact fields, schedules) when it needs user input
Always-on execution — workflows run 24/7 on triggers without requiring user presence
Human approval checkpoints — sensitive or outbound actions require one-time approval before running
Workspace memory — shared context, files, and preferences persist across all agents in a workspace
AI model selection — choose the LLM that fits each workflow (fast automation vs. deep reasoning)
Team workspaces — invite members, manage roles, and share automations across a workspace
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /api/chats — list and create AI chat sessions
GET/POST/DELETE /api/chats/[id]/messages — manage messages in a chat
POST /api/chats/[id]/agent — invoke the AI agent in a chat
GET/POST /api/automations — list and create workflow automations
GET/POST /api/files — upload files to workspace memory
